description_long: This is a large, two-story brick house with a complex, multi-gabled roof and several architectural features such as bay windows, a turret, and a wraparound porch. The front facade is symmetrical, with a central entryway flanked by tall windows and decorative columns. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious patio area with a fenced-in swimming pool, providing ample outdoor living space. Mature trees and landscaping surround the property, enhancing its residential character. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and bay configurations, and the roofline includes both gable and hip elements. The house exudes a blend of Colonial and Victorian influences, with brick as the primary exterior material and white trim accents.
description: A large, two-story brick house with a multi-gabled roof, bay windows, a turret, and a wraparound porch, featuring a rear patio and swimming pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical facade, bay windows, turret, and landscaped trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wraparound porch, turret, and partial view of the pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large patio, fenced swimming pool, and covered outdoor area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible landscaping, turret, and the side wall of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with bay and turret windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, decorative columns, overhang, and a covered porch
